basics.name: appName
basics.label: Service name
basics.toolTip: Name for the Container App and its supporting resources.

constraints.validationMessage: 3-32 chars: lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens; must start with a letter.

basics.name: apiKey
basics.label: API key (optional)
basics.toolTip: Shared secret Salesforce will send as the X-API-Key header. Leave blank to auto-generate a strong random key (shown in the deployment outputs).

constraints.validationMessage: Leave blank to auto-generate, or provide 16-128 chars (letters, numbers, . _ -).

elements.name: cpuCores
elements.label: Size (vCPU / memory)
elements.toolTip: Memory is paired automatically at 2 GiB per vCPU. 1 vCPU / 2 GiB matches the current service.

elements.name: warmReplica
elements.label: Availability
elements.toolTip: Always warm keeps one replica running so there is no cold start. Scale to zero is cheapest but the first request after idle waits ~10-30s.

elements.name: maxReplicas
elements.label: Max replicas
elements.toolTip: Upper limit for scale-out under load.
